rationale: The citing paper refers to Tavassoli and Lee (2003) only as background support in literature lists, mainly to note Singaporean bilingual fluency and to suggest that language cues can prime culture. The citation is not used to build the core hypotheses on impatience/time discounting, does not supply measures or design elements central to the reported studies, and is not discussed in interpreting the main results. Its role is therefore a passing contextual mention rather than a meaningful directional intellectual dependency.
